text: Moving from a communal space, vibrant with the hum of collective attention, into this exhibit, I feel a curious shift—from the comfort of being among others, to the stimulating solitude that surfaces amid displays of innovation. There is both excitement and humility in the presence of so much human ingenuity, alongside machines that mirror our reason. I wonder what it means to create, and how these technological artifacts might one day reflect us back to ourselves. Here, I feel open—ready to observe, contemplate, and question the intertwining of human and machine experience.
